uptime.title: Uptime Statistics

bandwidth.title: Bandwidth / Transfer Usage
bandwidth.note: Uses the same Hetzner API token as the VPS Stats module. Hetzner only bills outgoing traffic.
bandwidth.noData: No server traffic data available. Make sure your Hetzner API token is configured in Settings.

github.tokenScope: A personal access token with repo or actions:read scope.

github.noReposWithoutToken: Configure your GitHub token above, then add repositories to monitor.
